phantom.name: Rolls-Royce Phantom
phantom.description: The pinnacle of luxury motoring, an icon of automotive excellence and bespoke craftsmanship.

features.title: Magic Carpet Ride
features.desc: Experience a serene and smooth journey with the state-of-the-art self-leveling air suspension that absorbs any road imperfections.

features.title: Starlight Headliner
features.desc: Gaze upon a celestial dreamscape with a custom-made fiber optic roof, creating an illusion of a star-filled night sky.

features.title: Rear Theatre Configuration
features.desc: Entertain your guests with dual 12-inch HD screens, a bespoke audio system, and a center console with a drinks cabinet.

features.title: The Silent Chamber
features.desc: Enjoy unparalleled tranquility within the Phantom's cabin, thanks to over 130kg of sound insulation for a whisper-quiet ride.

ghost.name: Rolls-Royce Ghost
ghost.description: The epitome of minimalist luxury and cutting-edge technology.

features.title: Planar Suspension System
features.desc: Revolutionary suspension technology delivering unparalleled ride quality.

features.title: Illuminated Fascia
features.desc: Stunning starlight effect with 850+ individual stars creating ethereal ambiance.

features.title: Micro-Environment
features.desc: Advanced air purification system creating a sanctuary within the cabin.

features.title: Bespoke Audio Excellence
features.desc: Concert-hall acoustics with crystalline clarity for immersive experience.

cullinan.name: Rolls-Royce Cullinan
cullinan.description: The ultimate luxury SUV - Effortless, everywhere.

dawn.name: Rolls-Royce Dawn
dawn.description: The quietest and most luxurious convertible in the world.

wraith.name: Rolls-Royce Wraith
wraith.description: The most powerful and dynamic Rolls-Royce ever - a fastback grand tourer.

spectre.name: Rolls-Royce Spectre
spectre.description: The first fully electric Rolls-Royce. Experience whisper-silent luxury with 577hp instant torque, 520+ km range, and zero emissions.

features.title: 520+ km Range
features.desc: 102 kWh battery for all-day luxury touring

features.title: Starlight Headliner
features.desc: 1,340 fiber optic lights in your personal night sky

features.title: Fastback Design
features.desc: Dramatic coupé silhouette with aerodynamic elegance

features.title: Illuminated Spirit
features.desc: The iconic Spirit of Ecstasy, now illuminated
